summary: Completed testing of MVP Polish features for 'The Room' app. All 28 backend tests passed. Frontend Lesson Editor correctly shows new hosting_method (in_app/zoom only, no 'both') and recording_source (daily/youtube/external/none) options. Sequential lesson unlock, course/lesson publishing, and visibility controls work correctly.

integration_issues.issue: LessonWizard.jsx multi-step wizard not integrated - 'Add Lesson' button shows simple form instead of the step-by-step wizard. The new fields (hosting_method, recording_source) are only accessible in the LessonEditor after creation.
CourseWizard.jsx multi-step wizard not integrated - 'Create Course' button shows simple form instead of the step-by-step wizard.

passed_tests: Backend: Lesson creation with hosting_method='in_app' works
Backend: Lesson creation with hosting_method='zoom' works
Backend: Teacher can update hosting_method
Backend: recording_source='none' works
Backend: recording_source='daily' works
Backend: recording_source='youtube' with recording_url works
Backend: recording_source='external' with recording_url works
Backend: Create draft lesson (is_published=false) works
Backend: Create published lesson (is_published=true) works
Backend: Toggle lesson is_published works
Backend: Create draft course works
Backend: POST /courses/{id}/publish publishes course and lessons
Backend: POST /courses/{id}/unpublish works
Backend: Member cannot see draft course (404)
Backend: Member can see published course
Backend: Member cannot see draft lesson (404)
Backend: POST /lessons/{id}/complete works
Backend: Already completed lesson returns appropriate message
Backend: DELETE /lessons/{id}/complete removes completion
Backend: GET /courses/{id}/progress returns 0% when no lessons completed
Backend: GET /courses/{id}/progress returns correct partial percentage
Backend: First lesson always unlocked
Backend: Second lesson locked until first completed
Backend: Cannot complete locked lesson (403)
Backend: Teacher can see all lessons as unlocked (bypass)
Backend: GET /auth/onboarding-status works
Backend: POST /auth/onboarding-complete works
Backend: POST /auth/onboarding-step works
Frontend: Lesson Editor shows 'In-App Video Room' and 'Zoom Meeting' options (NO 'Both')
Frontend: Lesson Editor shows recording_source options (Daily, YouTube, External, None)
Frontend: Lesson Editor publish toggle visible and working
Frontend: Clicking Zoom shows zoom link input
Frontend: Clicking YouTube recording shows URL input
Frontend: Member sees only published courses
Frontend: Member sees Video Room join option (when hosting_method='in_app')
Frontend: Member sees YouTube player in NEXT tab (when recording_source='youtube')
Frontend: Member does not see Edit button (correct access control)
Frontend: Onboarding component exists and has proper structure
action_items: OPTIONAL: Integrate LessonWizard.jsx component to replace simple 'Add Lesson' dialog for better UX with multi-step flow (Basics → Hosting → Recording → Content → Review)
OPTIONAL: Integrate CourseWizard.jsx component to replace simple 'Create Course' dialog for better UX with draft/publish options
critical_code_review_comments: LessonWizard.jsx and CourseWizard.jsx components exist but are not integrated into the main flows - they could provide better onboarding UX for teachers creating content
Onboarding.jsx component exists but may need integration point (e.g., first login detection)
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during tests (TEST_ prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: MVP Polish complete. Key changes: hosting_method simplified to 'in_app' OR 'zoom' only (no 'both' option). recording_source field added with 4 options: daily, youtube, external, none. Sequential lesson unlock working - lessons are locked until previous completed (except first lesson). Course/lesson publishing controls visibility for members. LessonEditor.jsx contains all new fields and works correctly. LessonWizard.jsx and CourseWizard.jsx exist but are not yet integrated into the main UI flows - simple dialogs are used instead. Onboarding.jsx component exists for new user tutorial but integration point may need verification.
key_api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/courses/{id}/publish - publish course and all lessons
